# Third-Party Notice: vibecoded-design-tells

Workprint incorporates the `unslop-text` scanner and reference materials from
the upstream `vibecoded-design-tells` project.

## Upstream Project

- Project: `vibecoded-design-tells`
- Author/maintainer credit: JCarterJohnson
- Repository: https://github.com/JCarterJohnson/vibecoded-design-tells
- Pinned commit: `f7c4aefc2c797a66e55b49354a93917ab60d33ac`
- License: MIT
- Upstream license file preserved at: `third_party/vibecoded-design-tells/LICENSE`

## Files Incorporated

These files were copied from the pinned upstream revision:

- `LICENSE`
- `unslop-ai-text/skill/SKILL.md`
- `unslop-ai-text/skill/scripts/unslop_text_scan.py`
- `unslop-ai-text/skill/references/tells.md`
- `unslop-ai-text/skill/references/writing-with-intent.md`

The incorporated upstream files are unmodified.

## Upstream Functionality

The lexical scanner, lexical rules, rule severities, scanner JSON format,
scanner exit-code behavior, and `unslop-text` reference methodology belong to
JCarterJohnson's `vibecoded-design-tells` project.

## Workprint Functionality

Workprint adds its own integration wrapper, Executive Report narrative-section
selection, evidence-preservation validation, deterministic structural checks,
Markdown and JSON rendering, status rules, and report metadata.

Workprint's lexical copy-quality review incorporates the `unslop-text` scanner
and research developed by JCarterJohnson in the `vibecoded-design-tells`
project. Workprint pins and records the reviewed upstream revision, preserves
attribution and licensing information, and adds its own integration,
evidence-preservation checks, and deterministic structural review. The audit
identifies documented writing patterns; it does not determine whether text was
written by a human or an AI.

This notice does not imply that JCarterJohnson endorses Workprint.
